executives.name: Robert V. Pragada
executives.background: Mr. Pragada has served as Chief Executive Officer since January 2023 and as a Director since joining the Board in 2022. He previously served as President and Chief Operating Officer from 2019 to 2023. He first joined Jacobs in 2006 and held several executive roles before a brief departure to serve as President and CEO of the Brock Group from 2014 to 2016, returning to Jacobs in 2016.

executives.name: Claudia Jaramillo
executives.background: Ms. Jaramillo has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2023. She joined Jacobs in 2022 as Executive Vice President, Strategy and Corporate Development. Prior to Jacobs, she spent over 20 years at Schlumberger in various senior financial and operational leadership roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President, Strategy and Corporate Development

executives.name: Justin Johnson
executives.background: Mr. Johnson has served as Executive Vice President and Chief People and Communications Officer since 2023. He joined Jacobs in 2016 and has held various leadership roles in HR and communications.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief People and Communications Officer

executives.name: William B. Griffith
executives.background: Mr. Griffith has served as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer since 2021. He previously served as Vice President and Corporate Controller.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer

board_of_directors.name: Stephen A. Arnette
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Arnette has served as a Director since 2024. He is currently the President of the Critical Mission Solutions business at Jacobs.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher M.B. Galvin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Galvin has served as a Director since 2009. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Motorola, Inc. and is currently Chairman and Co-Founder of Harrison Street Real Estate Capital.

board_of_directors.name: Georgette D. Kiser
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kiser has served as a Director since 2019. She is an Operating Executive at The Carlyle Group and previously served as CIO of The Carlyle Group.

board_of_directors.name: Barbara Loughran
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Loughran has served as a Director since 2023. She was previously a partner at PwC where she held various leadership roles over a 30-year career.

board_of_directors.name: Robert A. McNamara
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McNamara has served as a Director since 2017. He is the former Group Chief Risk Officer of Lendlease Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Peter J. Robertson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Robertson has served as a Director since 2009. He is the former Vice Chairman of the Board of Chevron Corporation.

sources.source_description: Jacobs Solutions Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended September 29, 2023
Jacobs Solutions Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A)
